rulings.Case Title: ANGELIQUE ROCHELLE ET AL VS. TREVOR DENG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs TREVOR DENG and MAY DENG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. There are triable issues of fact regarding delayed discovery/diligence and regarding rescission based on fraud and undue influence. Defendant's objection to Paragraph 9 of Jin's declaration is sustained.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. CANTOR VS. SEAN KOMARMY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. CANTOR VS. SEAN KOMARMY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in goof faith that construction of a building over 40 feet high is underway and will be completed; that the requisite permits have been pulled or are not required for this construction.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FATEN KAMEL VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE HOLDINGS INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and BEAR STEARNS ARM TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2005-6 DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by the demurrer. The Court notes that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's September 14, 2017 minute order.= (501/REQ)
